title: Wise (TransferWise) API tokens should not be disclosed
description: Wise (formerly TransferWise) is an international money transfer and business banking platform. Wise API tokens provide access to account balances, transaction history, and the ability to initiate transfers. Exposing tokens can lead to unauthorized fund transfers and access to financial account data.
recommendation: Remove Wise API tokens from source code. Store in environment variables. Rotate immediately at wise.com/settings/api-tokens.
impact: Unauthorized access to financial accounts, transaction history, and potentially unauthorized money transfers.

checks.message: Wise (TransferWise) API token detected in variable assignment. Wise API tokens authenticate requests to access account balances, transaction history, and initiate international money transfers. Exposing this token could allow unauthorized reading of financial transaction history, account balance information, and in some token configurations, initiating unauthorized money transfers. Revoke immediately at wise.com/settings/api-tokens.
Wise API token detected. Wise tokens control international banking and money transfer operations. Rotate at wise.com/settings/api-tokens immediately.
